scripts.db:pull: op document get "Nuxt Craft - Database dump" > /tmp/craft-db.sql && (cd backend && ddev import-db --file=/tmp/craft-db.sql) && rm /tmp/craft-db.sql
scripts.db:push: cd backend && ddev export-db --gzip=false --file=- | op document edit "Nuxt Craft - Database dump" /dev/stdin
scripts.env:pull: op item get "Nuxt/Craft - Frontend ENV" --fields notesPlain | tr -d '"' > frontend/.env && op item get "Nuxt/Craft - Backend ENV" --fields notesPlain | tr -d '"' > backend/.env && echo 'Env files updated.'
scripts.env:push: op item edit "Nuxt/Craft - Frontend ENV" notesPlain="$(cat frontend/.env)" && op item edit "Nuxt/Craft - Backend ENV" notesPlain="$(cat backend/.env)" && echo 'Env files pushed to 1Password.'
